title: Immediate Requirement Software Engineer at Vodafone Idea

jsonLd.title: Immediate Requirement Software Engineer at Vodafone Idea
jsonLd.description:
Join the Vodafone Idea family as a Software Engineer in Indore. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Vodafone Idea:
Vodafone Idea is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Integrate third-party APIs and services

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in REST APIs

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Professional development and training programs
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Indore, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Vodafone Idea!
